_comment: Handoff 131 ACTIVE DOMAIN Phase 0 — the 'legitimate minimal design box' shape from the production complaint: the committed l-bracket.step (35525.84 mm^3) inside a 140x110x135 mm box (2.079e6 mm^3) => 1.71% part fill of the design domain, the ~1.7% the maintainer reported. Resolution 16 keeps the capture inside a probe budget; simp.max_iterations caps each rung.
